pages.title: Service Pistol
pages.text: The Glock 17 accepts 9mm ammunition and holds 17 rounds. In survival, this pack does not automatically reload an empty weapon. Use the configured Reload Gun control.

pages.title: Printing a Replacement
pages.text: The Glock is made in the Weapon Printer, not a vanilla crafting grid. Its installed recipe costs 20 Gunmetal Ingots, 4 Gun Internals, and 3 Iron Ingots.$(br2)

pages.title: Weapon Printer
pages.text: This standard crafting recipe is shown live. Place and use the printer to browse PointBlank firearm and ammunition jobs.

pages.title: Manufacturing Chain
pages.text: The processor and Gun Internals are part of the path from scavenged materials to replacement weapons.
